stories.headline: Georgia Senate GOP primary heads to runoff where electability is a top issue
stories.summary: Georgia was among six states where voters participated in primaries Tuesday. Its Senate race is among a handful that could determine party control next year.

stories.headline: Republican Thomas Massie who stood up to Trump defeated in Kentucky primary
stories.summary: With an estimated 72 percent of the vote counted, Ed Gallrein led with 54.4 percent to Massie’s 45.6 percent.

stories.headline: Global Long Bond Yields Climb to Highest in Almost Two Decades
stories.summary: The selloff in longer-maturity government bonds has pushed up yields to levels last seen during the global financial crisis, and strategists are warning the losses have room to run.

stories.headline: Thomas Massie Loses Kentucky House Primary to Trump-Backed Ed Gallrein
stories.summary: Representative Thomas Massie, President Trump’s chief G.O.P. antagonist in the House, lost to Ed Gallrein, Mr. Trump’s handpicked candidate.

stories.headline: Woodside CEO on Energy Market Disruptions, LNG Demand
stories.summary: Woodside CEO and Managing Director Liz Westcott discusses her concerns about the energy crunch sparked by the war in Iran. She speaks with Paul Allen from the sidelines of the Australian Energy Producers Conference in Adelaide.  (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.summary: Australian Energy Producers CEO Samantha McCulloch addresses the pressing challenges facing Australia’s energy sector. She speaks with Paul Allen from the sidelines of 'Australian Energy Producers Conference & Exhibition 2026' in Adelaide. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.summary: In the race to replace Senator Tommy Tuberville, Representative Barry Moore was leading a multicandidate field that included Jared Hudson, a former Navy SEAL, and Steve Marshall, the state attorney general.

stories.headline: Mike Collins and Derek Dooley Head to G.O.P. Senate Runoff in Georgia
stories.summary: Mr. Collins and Mr. Dooley are set to face each other on June 16 as they compete for the chance to challenge Senator Jon Ossoff, a popular Democrat.

stories.headline: Republican Primary for Georgia Governor Will Go to a Runoff
stories.summary: The state’s lieutenant governor, Burt Jones, will face a billionaire health care executive, Rick Jackson, on June 16 to decide the party’s standard-bearer to succeed Gov. Brian Kemp.

stories.headline: Andy Barr Wins Republican Primary for McConnell’s Seat in Kentucky
stories.summary: Mr. Barr, who serves in the House, consolidated support among Republicans in part by securing the endorsement of President Trump.

stories.headline: Hesai CEO Li on Earnings, Mercedes-Benz Deal
stories.summary: Chinese lidar maker Hesai’s co-founder and CEO David Li says its partnership with Mercedes‑Benz is a key milestone, saying it would move into production and scale across multiple models. He also says sectors like humanoid robotics are increasingly adopting its sensors, underscoring long-term growth potential. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.headline: UAE’s Averi Targets Johannesburg Listing Through Reverse Merger
stories.summary: Dubai-based Averi Finance is in talks with Mantengu Ltd. over a reverse takeover of the South African mining firm that would result in the Middle Eastern company listing in Johannesburg.

stories.headline: Indonesian Stocks Fall on Tightened Commodity Export Controls
stories.summary: Indonesian stocks fell during choppy trading on Wednesday after President Prabowo Subianto’s plan to tighten oversight of commodity exports fueled concern about greater state control and weaker profitability in a key industry.

stories.headline: Japan’s Longer Bonds Gain After Auction Brings Short-Term Relief
stories.summary: Japan’s longer-maturity government bonds gained after a 20-year auction reflected firm investor interest.

stories.headline: Indian Central Bank Intervenes as Rupee Drops to Record Low
stories.summary: India’s central bank intervened to shore up the struggling rupee as elevated oil prices pushed the currency to a record low.

stories.headline: China Bonds Buck Global Rout With Yields Hitting Nine-Month Low
stories.summary: China’s bonds are diverging further from peers as a fragile economic recovery and ample market liquidity keep local yields anchored despite a global debt selloff.

stories.headline: Sri Lankan Rupee Weakness Intensifying Due to Speculation, Official Says
stories.summary: A slide in the Sri Lankan rupee, Asia’s worst performing currency this month, has intensified due to speculation of further weakening, according to Deputy Minister of Finance Anil Jayantha Fernando.

stories.headline: Indonesian Palm Oil and Coal Stocks Drop on Export Control Plan
stories.summary: Indonesian palm oil and coal stocks tumbled, on the prospect of tighter state control over commodity exports from Southeast Asia’s largest economy.

stories.headline: Thailand tightens visa rules for tourists, citing crime by foreigners
stories.summary: Move brings an end to a 60 day visa-free stay that was agreed with 93 countries, including the UK, US and much of EuropeThailand is drastically cutting the length of visa-free stays for tourists from more than 90 countries in an effort to curb crime involving foreign nationals, officials said on Tuesday.Tourism is vital to the south-east Asian nation’s economy, but foreign arrivals are yet to return to their pre-Covid levels. stories.headline: Former governor general and Brisbane’s Anglican archbishop Peter Hollingworth dies at 91
stories.summary: Hollingworth, appointed governor general by John Howard in 2001, resigned over his handling of child sexual abuse in the Anglican churchFormer governor general Peter Hollingworth, who resigned over his handling of child sexual abuse in the Anglican church, has died.Hollingworth, who devoted much of his life to fighting poverty, served as the Anglican archbishop of Brisbane for 11 years from 1990, the first Australian-born person to hold the posit

stories.headline: US authorities say missionary who contracted Ebola en route to Germany
stories.summary: World Health Organization says death toll from outbreak has risen to 134, as experts warn of continued challenges.

stories.headline: Thousands of protesters demand president’s resignation in Bolivia’s La Paz
stories.summary: Bolivia faces its worst economic crisis in 40 years, fueling nationwide protests demanding the president's resignation.

stories.headline: UAE says mystery drones targeting nuclear plant came from Iraq
stories.summary: The UAE said drones that targeted its Barakah nuclear plant last week were launched from Iraq, indicating Tehran-backed militias have continued targeting Gulf energy infrastructure on behalf of Iran.

stories.headline: Merkel warns Europe can no longer rely on old security certainties
stories.summary: Former German Chancellor Angela Merkel was awarded the European Order of Merit on Tuesday. Merkel warned that Europe could no longer take peace and security for granted following Russia’s invasion of Ukraine. She also said changes in US security policy showed old certainties were fading.

stories.headline: Estonia says Nato jet shot down drone over its territory
stories.summary: Estonia suspects the drone was a Ukrainian projectile knocked off course by Russian electronic jamming.

stories.headline: Israeli minister Smotrich says ICC prosecutor seeking warrant for his arrest
stories.summary: The Hague-based court declines to comment, saying applications for warrants are classified as secret.

stories.headline: Anti-government demonstrators and police clash in Bolivia
stories.summary: Protesters have been calling for the president to resign after weeks-long unrest.

stories.headline: Katayama’s Warnings, Bessent’s BOJ Backing Still Leave Yen Weak

stories.headline: Early War Goal Was to Install Hard Line Former President as Iran’s Leader

stories.summary: The settlement will go towards individuals who allege they were subjected to unfair investigations.

stories.headline: The Republican who stood up to Trump is hoping for a big win against president
